title: Massive cashflow is allowed and mine
subtitle: A two-part energy statement for releasing the ceiling on income and allowing large inflows as normal.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 39 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release the belief that large cashflow belongs to other people or businesses, then allow it as ordinary, safe, and yours.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 39 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Anchor belief in massive cashflow."

practice.whenToUse: Use on any morning when the idea of six- or seven-figure inflows still feels laughable or out of reach.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 39 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release the belief that large cashflow is for other people, then allow it as ordinary and safe.

I release the belief that massive cashflow is for other people. I release the idea that large inflows are unsafe or unrealistic for me. I let go of every ceiling I have placed on what income is allowed to be.
I allow massive cashflow to be ordinary and safe. I allow large inflows to arrive steadily and stay. Massive cashflow is allowed and mine.
Read the release statement slowly, then pause. Read the allow statement and let the words land.
Adapted from Day 39 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
